column1: P1: ACTION/PROPS="Bowing deeply and gracefully" | TEXT="左様でございます" P2: ACTION/PROPS="Nodding gently with a calm smile" | TEXT="かしこまりました" P3: ACTION/PROPS="Opening a sliding door (shoji) elegantly" | TEXT="失礼いたします" P4: ACTION/PROPS="Pouring tea with precise movements" | TEXT="お茶をどうぞ" P5: ACTION/PROPS="Sitting in seiza (kneeling) perfectly" | TEXT="お呼びでしょうか" P6: ACTION/PROPS="Holding a closed fan to her chin thoughtfully" | TEXT="承知いたしました" P7: ACTION/PROPS="Walking gracefully with hands folded" | TEXT="お供いたします" P8: ACTION/PROPS="Presenting a document or scroll with both hands" | TEXT="こちらでございます" P9: ACTION/PROPS="Gently waving a hand in a welcoming gesture" | TEXT="ようこそお越しくださいました"
